title: Selector
description: Element selector for jig.findElement and jig.findElements

testID.description: Match by testID (accessibilityIdentifier on iOS, contentDescription on Android)

component.description: Match by React component name (requires JS bridge)

index.description: When multiple elements match, select the Nth (0-based)

within.description: Scope search to descendants of the element matching this selector

selector.description: Inner selector to match within the scoped container
